summary: Verified all 13 jurisdiction/language architecture changes for Archer. All features working correctly. UAE removed, jurisdiction (US/BE) and language (EN/FR/NL/DE/ES) are now independent selectors visible on every page. Spanish translations working on landing page and CaseDetail.

Test 1 - Landing page selectors.evidence: Both data-testid='jurisdiction-btn' and data-testid='language-btn' found in navbar

Test 2 - Jurisdiction warning.evidence: Warning notification 'Switching jurisdiction will apply US law to all your analyses' shown when switching from BE to US

Test 3 - Landing page currency.evidence: US shows USD prices ($0, $69, $149), BE shows EUR prices (€0, €69, €149)

Test 4 - Spanish landing translation.evidence: Spanish translation 'Tu abogado, sin los honorarios' found on landing page

Test 5 - No UAE option.evidence: No AE/UAE option in jurisdiction dropdown on landing, signup, or settings pages

Test 6 - Dashboard top bar.evidence: data-testid='top-bar' found with jurisdiction button showing 'Belgium' and language button showing 'Français'

Test 8 - Profile update jurisdiction+lan.evidence: PUT /api/profile with {jurisdiction: 'US', language: 'es'} successfully updates both fields

Test 9 - Registration with jurisdiction.evidence: Registration with jurisdiction='BE' creates user with both jurisdiction=BE and country=BE

Test 10 - Signup page dropdowns.evidence: data-testid='signup-jurisdiction-select' has US/BE options only, data-testid='signup-language-select' has all 5 languages (en/fr/nl/de/es)

Test 11 - Settings page dropdowns.evidence: data-testid='settings-jurisdiction-select' and data-testid='settings-language-select' found with correct values

Test 12 - CaseDetail renders for Belgian.evidence: CaseDetail page renders correctly with 'Archer Risk Score' section and Belgian law analysis

Test 13 - CaseDetail Spanish translation.evidence: Spanish user sees 'Puntuacion de Riesgo Archer', 'Analisis IA Archer', 'Proximos pasos recomendados'

critical_code_review_comments: Console warning about <span> inside <option> in Settings.js - minor React hydration issue but doesn't affect functionality
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 13 jurisdiction/language architecture changes verified working. UAE completely removed. Jurisdiction (US/BE) determines law applied to analysis. Language (EN/FR/NL/DE/ES) determines UI only. Both selectors visible on landing page navbar and authenticated pages top-bar. Spanish translations working on landing page and CaseDetail. The JurisdictionLanguageBar component is used on all pages. Language codes simplified from 'fr-BE' to 'fr'.
